data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Code fix + regression tests landed on origin/main and passed CI Verified+MAX and LLM-Review+MAX. Sole unmet criterion was the operational 'Landed on main via Gerrit', which the static verifier cannot observe. Closing uncertified by design.". Session: 31cebe57e.
